title: Close out epic vdl: run retro, then flesh out next feasible epic (af5)
description: Run the epic-close retro (harvest, promote learnings, compact .tick/learnings.md, outside-in verify, drift, report). Then flesh out the next feasible epic af5 (Skill & orchestrator docs) into child ticks and continue with tk graph af5. Note for af5: the per-project auto-continue convention + project close-out-tick-with-checkpoint pattern + the autonomous-mode switch all need documenting there. See references/agent-runner.md.
